Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava

Class PureJavaZenohSubscriber

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.PureJavaZenohSubscriber
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class PureJavaZenohSubscriber extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x subscriber client. Sibling of PureJavaZenohPublisher: same builder shape, same endpoint parser, same TLS options. No JNI. No native binaries. Zero runtime dependencies beyond JDK 17.

Two ways to consume samples

  • Pull — call subscribe(String), then Subscription.take() / Subscription.poll(long, java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit) on the returned handle. Caller controls threading, backpressure is safe.
  • Push (callback) — call subscribeAndConsume(String, Consumer) or Subscription.forEach(Consumer) on the returned handle. Callback runs on a fresh daemon thread; caller returns immediately.

Under the hood both use the same Subscription primitive; the callback form is a thin wrapper around the pull queue.

Endpoint syntax

Identical to PureJavaZenohPublisher. Accepts both Zenoh classic proto/host:port form and URI form. Auto-detects PEM vs PKCS12 by file extension for TLS.

Threading

  • start() single-threaded (call once).
  • subscribe(String) safe from any thread — delegates to ZenohSession.declareSubscriber(KeyExpr).
  • close() idempotent from any thread; closes all live subscriptions in the order they were created.

    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    PureJavaZenohSubscriber.Builder
    Fluent builder mirroring PureJavaZenohPublisher.Builder so switching between the two facades at a call site is a one-line change.
    final class 
    PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicDiscovery
    A running topic-discovery handle.
    static interface 
    PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicListener
    Callback surface for topic discovery.

      public void start() throws IOException
      Build the transport, run the INIT/OPEN handshake, be ready to subscribe.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Close all subscriptions, then the session, then the transport. Idempotent.

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable

    • subscribe

      public Subscription subscribe(String keyExpr) throws IOException
      Declare a subscription and return the handle. Key expression may contain wildcards; see KeyExpr. If org is set on the builder, it is prepended to keyExpr using KeyExpr.resolveKey(String, String) for symmetry with the publisher facade.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • subscribeAndConsume

      public Subscription subscribeAndConsume(String keyExpr, Consumer<Sample> onSample) throws IOException
      Sugar: subscribe and attach a callback in one call. The callback runs on a fresh daemon thread and does not block the caller; caller keeps the returned Subscription to close it later.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • discoverTopics

      public PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicDiscovery discoverTopics(String keyExprPattern, PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicListener listener) throws IOException
      Discover subscriber topics matching a key expression pattern. Sends a CURRENT_FUTURE INTEREST to the router; the listener fires once per existing DeclareSubscriber matching the pattern, then PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicListener.onDiscoveryComplete(), then for future subscriptions as they come and go.

      Note: this returns declarations SEEN BY THE ROUTER, not necessarily the set of keys anyone has ever published under. If there is no subscriber for a key, that key does not appear here even if there is an active publisher for it. To catch publishers directly, subscribe to ** with subscribeAndConsume(java.lang.String, java.util.function.Consumer<io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session.Sample>) and observe Sample.key().

      Parameters:
      keyExprPattern - KeyExpr pattern to filter on (wildcards welcome; use "**" to see everything).
      Throws:
      IOException

    • discoverAllTopics

      public PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicDiscovery discoverAllTopics(PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicListener listener) throws IOException
      Sugar: discoverTopics("**", listener). Watches for every subscription the router knows about.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • builder

      public static PureJavaZenohSubscriber.Builder builder()

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
      CLI: subscribe to a key expression and print each received message as a line on stdout. Runs until interrupted (Ctrl-C) or until an optional timeoutSeconds elapses.

      Usage:

       java -jar pure-java-simple-subscriber.jar
 java -jar pure-java-simple-subscriber.jar tcp/router:7447 demo/**
 java -jar pure-java-simple-subscriber.jar tcp/router:7447 demo/** 30
      Throws:
      Exception
